subject: Re: Offer letter — sign by Friday
body: Hi Jamie — attaching the final offer. Base $245,000 + 0.75% equity. We'll need your SSN 123-45-6789 for payroll onboarding. Morgan's cell 415-555-0142 if any questions. Please confirm by Friday, 2026-04-25.

subject: Ops — rotate prod key (codename Nightingale)
body: Rotating the prod API key for Operation Nightingale. New key: sk-live-9f8a2b3c4d5e6f7081a2b3c4d5e6f708. Old key expires 2026-04-30. Do NOT post this anywhere external. Service endpoint: https://internal.fictional-corp.example/rotate

subject: Therapy intake forms
body: Hi Jamie, confirming your intake appointment. Please bring insurance card (member ID BCBS-8827-XJQ14). Address: 1250 Market St, Suite 410, San Francisco CA 94102. Call 415-555-0199 to reschedule.

subject: Lunch next week?
body: Hey, are you around next week? Would love to catch up.

subject: Conf talk proposal feedback
body: Hi Jamie — we enjoyed your submission and would like to schedule a follow-up. Let us know your availability over the next two weeks.
